narrative:
Liberty Twp 8 (precinct in Butler County) has 1,672 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.1 percentage points.
